problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
